en_title: Control Resonant Release Date Announced in New Trailer, Costs $60
cn_title: 《控制：共振》发售日公布，定价60美元(约合人民币407元)
subtitle: 弟弟登场，价格惊喜
opus_summary: Remedy Entertainment在PlayStation State of Play上公布了《控制：共振》的发售日期和新预告。游戏将于9月24日登陆PS5、Xbox Series和PC，标准版售价59.99美元(约合人民币430元)，比当前3A游戏均价低10美元(约合人民币68元)。本作将让玩家扮演杰西·费登的弟弟迪伦·费登，阻止吞噬曼哈顿的超自然威胁。PS5玩家可购买豪华版获得48小时抢先体验。Remedy首席商务官表示这是工作室迄今最具野心的作品，游戏总监也在PlayStation博客上深入介绍了剧情。本作与《心灵杀手2》共享宇宙，但关联程度尚不明确。此外，Remedy正与Rockstar合作重制《马克思·佩恩》前两部。

paragraphs.en: The release date for Control Resonant was finally revealed alongside a new trailer revealed at the PlayStation State of Play. It's coming September 24 this year and the new trailer gave us another look at the story of Control Resonant, the sequel to Remedy Entertainment's 2019 beloved action game. This time, players will fill the shoes of Dylan Faden, the tortured brother of Jesse Faden (protagonist of the first game), to stop a castastrophic supernatural threat that has consumed Manhattan and could eliminate humanity as we know it.
paragraphs.cn: 《控制：共振》的发售日期终于在PlayStation State of Play上与新预告一同揭晓。游戏将于今年9月24日发售，新预告让我们再次一窥这款Remedy Entertainment 2019年备受喜爱的动作游戏续作的故事。这一次，玩家将扮演杰西·费登（初代主角）备受折磨的弟弟迪伦·费登，阻止一场吞噬曼哈顿、可能毁灭人类文明的灾难性超自然威胁。

paragraphs.en: Remedy isn't following the new norm for AAA game pricing, as the standard edition will cost just $59.99, which is $10 cheaper than what's expected nowadays. However, if you want some extra in-game goodies you can pay $69.99 for the digital deluxe edition.
paragraphs.cn: Remedy并未遵循当前3A游戏的定价新常态，标准版仅售59.99美元(约合人民币430元)，比现今预期价格便宜10美元(约合人民币68元)。不过，如果你想要一些额外的游戏内奖励，可以支付69.99美元(约合人民币502元)购买数字豪华版。

paragraphs.en: PlayStation players will also get a big bonus, as there will be a special PlayStation digital deluxe edition that grants players 48-hours of early access. This will only be available to PS5 owners, so Xbox and PC players will have to wait until September 24 to jump in on the action.
paragraphs.cn: PlayStation玩家还将获得一项重大福利：一款特殊的PlayStation数字豪华版将提供48小时抢先体验。该版本仅限PS5玩家购买，因此Xbox和PC玩家需等到9月24日才能加入行动。

paragraphs.en: “ Control Resonant is Remedy Entertainment’s most expansive game ever, complete with incredible gameplay, narrative twists and challenging creativity that will keep old fans and new engaged and entertained like nothing we have created before,” said Johannes Paloheimo, Remedy’s Chief Commercial Officer and head of publishing. “As Remedy is self-publishing Control Resonant, our global marketing efforts will be just as ambitious in its execution and style, evidenced by this inclusion in the State of Play and leading us into Summer Game Fest and beyond. We will have a number of events and opportunities for fans over the summer as we move towards the game’s release on September 24.” Additionally, game director Mikael Kasurinen gave a deeper look on the story of Control Resonant on the official PlayStation blog.
paragraphs.cn: Remedy首席商务官兼发行主管Johannes Paloheimo表示：「《控制：共振》是Remedy Entertainment迄今为止最具野心的游戏，拥有令人难以置信的游戏玩法、叙事转折和富有挑战性的创意，将让新老玩家沉浸其中，获得前所未有的娱乐体验。由于Remedy将自行发行《控制：共振》，我们的全球营销工作在执行和风格上也将同样雄心勃勃，此次入选State of Play以及随后进入Summer Game Fest等活动就是证明。在9月24日游戏发售前的整个夏天，我们将为粉丝们举办一系列活动和提供众多机会。」此外，游戏总监Mikael Kasurinen在官方PlayStation博客上深入介绍了《控制：共振》的故事。

paragraphs.en: We had a hands-off Control Resonant preview opportunity back in March, and executive previews editor Ryan McCaffrey came away impressed, concluding, "After seeing Control Resonant’s aggressive, fast-paced combat for myself, I’m even more fired up to get my hands on it."
paragraphs.cn: 我们曾在3月获得一次《控制：共振》的非上手预览机会，执行预览编辑Ryan McCaffrey对此印象深刻，他总结道：「亲眼目睹《控制：共振》激进、快节奏的战斗后，我更加迫不及待想要亲自上手了。」

paragraphs.en: Control Resonant may also be a continuation of some of the events from Alan Wake 2 , as the games share a universe, but it's unclear how important Alan Wake's previous story will be to this game. Remedy is also currently developing remakes of the first two Max Payne games in partnership with Rockstar Games. More details will be shared on those games at a later date.
paragraphs.cn: 《控制：共振》可能也是《心灵杀手2》部分事件的延续，因为两款游戏共享同一宇宙，但尚不清楚《心灵杀手》之前的故事对本作有多重要。Remedy目前还与Rockstar合作开发《马克思·佩恩》前两部的重制版。更多细节将在日后公布。

paragraphs.en: The State of Play stream was packed with reveals, including God of War Laufey, which we have an exclusive developer interview for; and for all the other announcements, check out our roundup of everything from the June 2026 State of Play .
paragraphs.cn: State of Play直播中公布了大量内容，包括《战神：劳菲》——我们对其进行了独家开发者访谈；至于其他所有公告，请查看我们整理的2026年6月State of Play全部内容汇总。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，报道游戏、电影等所有娱乐内容。你可以在Twitter上关注他 @Cade_Onder。
